f.description: Fixed cost to open warehouse j

c.description: Transportation cost if all of customer i's demand is served by warehouse j (already accounts for d_i)

assumptions.description: Demand of each customer is positive.

code.python: assert all(d[i] > 0 for i in range(n))

assumptions.description: Capacity of each warehouse is non-negative.

code.python: assert all(u[j] >= 0 for j in range(m))

assumptions.description: Transportation cost for each customer-warehouse pair is non-negative.

code.python: assert all(c[i][j] >= 0 for i in range(n) for j in range(m))

assumptions.description: Fixed cost to open each warehouse is non-negative.

code.python: assert all(f[j] >= 0 for j in range(m))

x.description: 1 if customer i is assigned to warehouse j, 0 otherwise

y.description: 1 if warehouse j is opened, 0 otherwise

C.description: For each warehouse j, the lifted conflict set C[j]: start with customers whose demand exceeds u_j/2 (any two of them already conflict at j), then greedily add remaining customers — in non-increasing demand order — that conflict (sum exceeds u_j) with every already-included member.
C.formulation: C_j = \{ i \in I : d_i > u_j / 2 \} \cup \{ i \text{ added greedily, non-increasing } d_i, \text{ s.t. } d_i + d_{i'} > u_j \;\forall i' \in C_j \} \quad \forall j \in J

constraints.description: Each customer is assigned to exactly one warehouse.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(x[i, j] for j in range(m)) == 1 for i in range(n))

constraints.description: Capacity: total demand assigned to each warehouse cannot exceed its capacity times whether it is open.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{i \in I} d_i \, x_{ij} \leq u_j \, y_j \quad \forall j \in J

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(d[i] * x[i, j] for i in range(n)) <= u[j] * y[j] for j in range(m))

constraints.description: Warehouse Clique (EC5): for each warehouse j, the lifted conflict set C[j] satisfies sum_{i in C[j]} x_{ij} <= y_j.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(x[i, j] for i in C[j]) <= y[j] for j in range(m) if C[j])

objective.description: Minimize the total fixed opening cost plus transportation cost.
objective.formulation: \min \sum_{j \in J} f_j \, y_j + \sum_{i \in I} \sum_{j \in J} c_{ij} \, x_{ij}

code.gurobipy:
model.setObjective(
    gp.quicksum(f[j] * y[j] for j in range(m)) +
    gp.quicksum(c[i][j] * x[i, j] for i in range(n) for j in range(m)),
    GRB.MINIMIZE
)
